Other: 0200: At 0200 discovered the Barque Lucy Hale of Boston to be on fire. Sent four boats to her assistance. Rec'd four of her crew, confined two in double irons and two under the Sentry's charge. The fire, the work of an incendiary, was extinguished by the united efforts of the boats' crews of the Wyoming, Lancaster and the French frigates Bayonnaise and La Serieuse. The vessel, which was laden with guano, was greatly damaged.
